div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 5px; margin-bottom: 12px; padding: 6px 10px; border: 2px solid #000; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; background: #fff;
font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 11px; white-space: nowrap;

font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; flex-grow: 1; text-align: center; border-left: 1px solid #ddd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 0 5px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;
font-size: 10px; font-weight: 900; background: #000; color: #fff; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 3px; white-space: nowrap;
